feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >be 90s >every sound system has an equalizer >fast forward 2020s >"noooooooo tha…
entry.content: >be 90s >every sound system has an equalizer >fast forward 2020s >"noooooooo that's audiophile equipment, you'll need to drop 2000 dollarinos!"
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Josh Sawyer does not like the way Bethesda handles its open world balance
entry.content: >controversial statement I'm going to make... Fallout 3 was not a hard game. Skyrim is also not a hard game. The combat in these games is not super challenging. Skyrim is a game that everybody plays forever, and this is not the only reason, but the fact that it is quite forgiving to the player in terms of scaling is part of it. You can wander the whole map to your heart's content, and with a few exceptions you're probably not gonna die. Same also applies to Fallout 3. >In New Vegas, I was trying
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Black Ops 2
entry.content: Im having more fun with this than any game I have played in the last 5 years or so.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE
entry.content: >https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ft CvnEE6rfI You know they're just making this as an excuse to never make turn-based JRPGs again, right? When this cheap recycle fails to sell 3m on launch day Square Enix is just going to shrug and go back to remakes to see if they can milk a few more dollars out of the dwindling cattle that still pretend their recent games are even passable. You can tell because they are putting zero dollara into marketing it: they WANT this to fail.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The uncontested STRONGEST woman in the world.
entry.content: The uncontested STRONGEST woman in the world.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: pokemon puzzle league fangame
entry.content: >the new class of '09 game drops within less than ten hours >not a single thread I thought this shit was popular here? I know people still believe Ash's lies about SBN3 and sheeeeeit but who doesn't like the idea of a puzzle game starring insane high school sluts?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: So you're saying everything I've done was in vain?
entry.content: So, I'm gonna perish because I am is a piece of meat? So, I'm not going to be white in another world 'cause I'm a piece of meat and not a soul. So I am Earthbound? I want to be cindered and not be eaten by worms. I don't have courage to kill myself, because it's too scary. No one from the other world helps me kill myself. I hope that I die but I hope that all humanity dies too.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: In the earliest and most authoritative sources, especially Iliad and later Greek…
entry.content: In the earliest and most authoritative sources, especially Iliad and later Greek literature, Achilles is consistently described with the following attributes: The greatest Greek warrior - unmatched in battle. Swift-footed (podas okus) - his most famous Homeric epithet. Son of a goddess - born to Thetis and the mortal Peleus. Nearly invincible - although the famous "Achilles' heel" story appears in later tradition, not in Homer. Extraordinarily strong - capable of feats beyond ordinary men. Excep
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This scene doesn't work, only because it breaks the flow of the movie. I could m…
entry.content: This scene doesn't work, only because it breaks the flow of the movie. I could make this scene work with some experimental editing. Put a humming sound throughout the whole first act, it keeps getting louder and louDER AND LOUDEER then cuts to bird sounds when it gets to this scene. And pull up the exposure. Make it dream-like.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: Should I Give In?
entry.content: I think my gf wants something bigger. Lately she has been wanting bigger toys and only cums with me if she’s using a vibrator. I want to give her what she wants. Am I really that small? Should I be open to bigger toys for her? I want her to be happy but also know it could be a slippery slope. Pic is me hard.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: China Introduced 4 New Cars Every Day Of 2026
entry.content: Around 650 new or refreshed cars were introduced in the first half of the year — a rate of almost four a day — according to data compiled by automotive platform Dongchedi. That contrasts with the US, where Bank of America Securities' annual Car Wars study for 2025 projected just 159 new model launches over the following four years, following a decade low of only 29 in 2024. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/arti cles/2026-07-16/china-s-insane-car- market-flooded-with-hundreds-of-new -models?srnd=ph
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: Previous thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84107453/ Keep extreme to a minimum. Keep 3D black cocks and tributes in the main thread. >Official Vtuber BLACKED and NTR creators directory: https://rentry.co/2y7hteeq Upload your gens or edits to BlackedBooru! Too many gens and edits are lost to the archive! https://blacked.booru.org/ >Vtuber BBC Related Clips and Evidence Corpo snowbunnies: https://rentry.co/3od5cn8e Indie coalburners: https://rentry.co/7ry5vvry >Free/Easy 3D/2D AI Cloth

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /SDBBW/ AI Generated Fatties #134
entry.content: Bellyfuck Edition Post any pic of AI-generated chubby, fat, stuffed, inflated, or otherwise huge characters. All species and genders allowed, of any style or model, so long as they're big and they're AI-generated. Please respect the site rules- no underage, illegal, spam, advertising, etc. >Previous thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84029918 >Previous archived threads: https://desuarchive.org/trash/searc h/subject/sdbbw/ >Catbox https://catbox.moe/ If you're trying to troubleshoot/ge
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Remember to updoot guys or you will be hacked, also dont forget secure boot and …
entry.content: Remember to updoot guys or you will be hacked, also dont forget secure boot and TPM (both very important to be enabled), update the BIOS and monitor firmware as well

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What are some truly great games? Things that you'd be able to to quantify as "hi…
entry.content: What are some truly great games? Things that you'd be able to to quantify as "high art"? I've been trying to find a game that deals with hope, despair, humanity, etc. The best thing that I can think of that does this is Berserk, although not a videogame. But what I think really elevates a game is how it uses it's own medium to tell a story. Something like Dark Souls comes to mind. What games should I play? Maybe NieR would fit this?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Earlier today I asked about lifting a 100kg object using a rope tied to a beam. …
entry.content: Earlier today I asked about lifting a 100kg object using a rope tied to a beam. So I got a 20kg sack of cement attached to it and the beam started to make cracking sounds. I have no fucking alternative now. I don't know what to tie the rope around now
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What are the odds of my laptop battery exploding on my lap and blasting my dick off?
entry.content: I have a 2020 MacBook Air, and it's starting to feel like it's on its last legs—lots of crashes, bad battery life, overheating and the CPU or fan or whatever just screaming. I should probably just get a new one before it completely dies, but until then, do I need to worry at all about safety? I'm rather attached to my penis, and would hate to lose it.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >I can envision a future where everybody has an AI super-computer in their house…
entry.content: >I can envision a future where everybody has an AI super-computer in their house, like you have a home theater in your house, you have a stereo system in you house Yes I agree with the AI super-computer in the house thing, but I think a price over 2000$ would be a bit too steep. I would totaly have a AI super-computer in my house if it was under 3 digits though.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What is the best way to learn to play piano? My goal is to be able to improvise …
entry.content: What is the best way to learn to play piano? My goal is to be able to improvise jazzy and bluesy songs. I'm not interested in playing classic music like Bach or Chopin (even though I enjoy listening to them being performed). Maybe my question is too general and I'm sorry for that.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Thoughts on fact we can't figure out how to optimize 0,1 sequences to have littl…
entry.content: Thoughts on fact we can't figure out how to optimize 0,1 sequences to have little noise at scales above n=30 https://arxiv.org/pdf/1512.02475 this is reason why lag exists at all cause no one has optimized this problem. If we're able to do so lag as we know it would be non existent outside of hardware
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The Light in the Darkness
entry.content: I'm making this thread because Brazilian Theodore keeps making more and more threads and, in a broader sense, there are a lot of depressed guys on this board. I agree that life is cruel for the most part. I'm a man on the autism spectrum. Life as an autistic man is hard because most people think that all autistic men are rapists who deserve a lifetime of torture. That is "the darkness". Life is still worth living because there are a few good things in life that make the cruelty bearable. That is
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why gamers no longer care for replayability?
entry.content: It is a pattern I have noticed when it comes to popular games and even games discussed here. Western first world gamers seem to no longer care about replayability, why is that? For example, I am a white south american, where I come from we really want our games to be replayable. We want to extract the maximum value out of the money we spend. Maybe that economical situation is why western first world gamers no longer care about videogames being games, but experiences, you pay $20 minimum and get
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why is this game considered a classic by many now?
entry.content: Even at the time it was considered to be fine but nothing more.
